TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Adama Barrow == ryax sa tay 16 nqu tay 2, Adama Barrow, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1965) mrhuw Gambia ta' misuw hya' ga Adama Barrow, aring ryax tay 19 squ byacing tay 1 sa kawas 2017 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. pinqbaqan nya Adama Barrow mqwas biru sa Koba Kunda pqwasan biru laqi cikuy. Adama Barrow mqwas biru sa Crab Island pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas, Banjul. qnxan nya Adama Barrow maki msqun ki Fatoumatta Bah, ki Sarjo Mballow, tehuk misuw qani. Fatoumatta Bah ga, kneril ni Adama Barrow. Sarjo Mballow ga, kneril ni Adama Barrow. Haro' ga, la'iy ni Adama Barrow. mintzyuwaw nya Adama Barrow hiya ga m'sezi. maki sa kawas 2016, t'aring mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na sezi. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: == a*ama βarrow == rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, a*ama βarrow, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw ɣamβia taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa a*ama βarrow, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. pinqβaqan nja a*ama βarrow mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa koβa kun*a pqwas~ɕan βiru laqi ʦ~ʨikuj. a*ama βarrow mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa ʦ~ʨraβ is~ɕlan* pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ, βanjul. qnxan nja a*ama βarrow maki ms~ɕqun ki *atoumatta βaħ, ki s~ɕarjo mβallow, teħuk mis~ɕuw qani. *atoumatta βaħ ɣa, kneril ni a*ama βarrow. s~ɕarjo mβallow ɣa, kneril ni a*ama βarrow. ħaroʔ ɣa, laʔij ni a*ama βarrow. mintzjuwaw nja a*ama βarrow ħija ɣa mʔs~ɕezi. maki s~ɕa kawas~ɕ ****, tʔariŋ mtzjuwaw zjuwaw na s~ɕezi. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
S.FORM: == Adama Barrow == ryax sa tay 16 nqu tay 2, Adama Barrow, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1965) mrhuw Gambia ta' misuw hya' ga Adama Barrow, aring ryax tay 19 squ byacing tay 1 sa kawas 2017 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. pinqbaqan nya Adama Barrow mqwas biru sa Koba Kunda pqwasan biru laqi cikuy. Adama Barrow mqwas biru sa Crab Island pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas, Banjul. qnxan nya Adama Barrow maki msqun ki Fatoumatta Bah, ki Sarjo Mballow, tehuk misuw qani. Fatoumatta Bah ga, kneril ni Adama Barrow. Sarjo Mballow ga, kneril ni Adama Barrow. Haro' ga, la'iy ni Adama Barrow. mintzyuwaw nya Adama Barrow hiya ga m'sezi. maki sa kawas 2016, t'aring mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na sezi. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: == a*ama βarrow == rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, a*ama βarrow, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw ɣamβia taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa a*ama βarrow, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. pinqβaqan nja a*ama βarrow mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa koβa kun*a pqwas~ɕan βiru laqi ʦ~ʨikuj. a*ama βarrow mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa ʦ~ʨraβ is~ɕlan* pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ, βanjul. qnxan nja a*ama βarrow maki ms~ɕqun ki *atoumatta βaħ, ki s~ɕarjo mβallow, teħuk mis~ɕuw qani. *atoumatta βaħ ɣa, kneril ni a*ama βarrow. s~ɕarjo mβallow ɣa, kneril ni a*ama βarrow. ħaroʔ ɣa, laʔij ni a*ama βarrow. mintzjuwaw nja a*ama βarrow ħija ɣa mʔs~ɕezi. maki s~ɕa kawas~ɕ ****, tʔariŋ mtzjuwaw zjuwaw na s~ɕezi. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
